from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Callable, Any

@dataclass
class Connection:
    host: str
    port: int
    username: str
    password: str
    socket: Any = None

    def __enter__(self):
        self.socket = socket.create_connection((self.host, self.port))
        self.socket.send(f"AUTH {self.username} {self.password}\n".encode())
        return self

    def __exit__(self, *args):
        if self.socket:
            self.socket.close()

    def send(self, data):
        self.socket.send(data.encode())

@dataclass
class PipelineStep:
    name: str
    fn: Callable

class Pipeline:
    def __init__(self):
        self._steps = []

    def add_step(self, name: str, fn: Callable):
        self._steps.append(PipelineStep(name=name, fn=fn))
        return self

    def execute(self, initial_data=None):
        data = initial_data
        for step in self._steps:
            data = step.fn(data)
        return data
